_comment: Consumed by bin/jonny-bench.mjs. $RUN_HOME=temp home, $WORKDIR=temp project dir, $RUN_DIR=results dir, $MODEL_ARG from models.json, $EFFORT=reasoning effort from models.json or null, $CAP_MINUTES=bench.capMinutes minus a 2-minute buffer, formatted like "28m" (for CLIs with their own internal wait timeout shorter than our wall-clock cap), $PROMPT=bench body, $SESSION_ID=uuid, $USER=real user. If an argv element references $EFFORT and the model has no effort, that element and its preceding flag element are omitted. credsFiles are copied from the real ~ into $RUN_HOME (0600). authExec writes stdout to writeTo (0600). seedFiles copies selected JSON keys plus extras (0600). env REPLACES the environment (runner adds PATH/TERM/LANG/LC_ALL allowlist only).

claude-code.usage: cli-output.jsonl stdout result event: total_cost_usd + all tokens processed = input_tokens + cache_read_input_tokens + cache_creation_input_tokens + output_tokens

codex.usage: cli-output.jsonl wrappers: stdout text contains JSONL; last type=turn.completed usage.{input_tokens,output_tokens}, or rollout transcript token_count total_token_usage.total_tokens fallback; input_tokens already includes cached tokens. no USD field (ChatGPT plan, unmetered). reasoning effort is pinned with model_reasoning_effort=$EFFORT; reasoning summaries enabled via model_reasoning_summary=detailed.

grok.usage: No stable total-usage event was verified from the Grok streaming-json probe in this environment; extraction records totalTokens and totalCostUsd as null until a real output shape is proven. reasoning effort is pinned with --reasoning-effort $EFFORT.

agy.usage: This is the Antigravity CLI (agy), not the plain `gemini` CLI: the classic Gemini CLI oauth-personal login is rejected with IneligibleTierError on this account (migrate-to-Antigravity), and agy is the working replacement for the same Gemini 3.1 Pro model. Effort tier has no separate flag -- it's baked into $MODEL_ARG itself (e.g. "Gemini 3.1 Pro (High)"). --new-project is required or agy silently writes output under $RUN_HOME/.gemini/antigravity-cli/scratch/ instead of $WORKDIR, and locateAppDir never finds it. --print-timeout must be passed explicitly: agy's own internal wait timeout defaults to 5m, well under our wall-clock cap, and would truncate a run before our own cap ever fires; $CAP_MINUTES is bench.capMinutes minus a 2-minute buffer. No JSON output format flag was found (verified via --help) -- stdout is plain text and cli.log is an unstructured Go operational log, so totalTokens/totalCostUsd record null, same as the prior gemini recipe.
